mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM dorm_room r INNER JOIN dorm_bed b ON r.id = b.room_id WHERE b.occupant_id = #{studentId} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND b.del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, b.building_name AS buildingName, b.building_no AS buildingNo, f.floor_num AS floorNum, (r.capacity - r.current_num) AS emptyBeds FROM dorm_room r LEFT JOIN dorm_building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN dorm_floor f ON r.floor_id = f.id WHERE r.id = #{roomId} AND r.del_flag = '0'
SELECT status AS status, COUNT(id) AS total_count FROM dorm_fixed_asset WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY status
